ae

“wm 832 nedS6

WARRANTY DEED

STATE OF MISSISSIPPI

COUNTY OF MARION

FOR AND IN CONSIDERATION of the sum of TEN AND NO/100 DOLLARS
($10.00), cash in hand paid, and other good and valuable considerations,
the receipt of all of which is hereby acknowledged, I, the undersigned
L. D. GARNER, a widower, herein reserving unto myself a life estate, do
hereby sell, convey, and warrant unto GLEN GARNER and BETTY CAROLYN G.
McPHAIL, in equal shares, the following described property situated in

MARION COUNTY, MISSISSIPPI, to wit:

PARCEL 1: NE% of SE% of Section 4, Township 5
North, Range 18 West.

PARCEL 2: SE of NE of Section 4, Township 5
North, Range 18 West. LESS AND EXCEPT that cer-
tain two-acre tract described as follows: Com-
mencing at the Northwest corner of the SE% of NE
of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range 18 West,
Marion County, Mississippi, and thence run 460
feet and to the East right-of-way iune of the
Columbia to Mt. Carmel Public Road (also being the
point of interesection of the East right-of-way
line of the Mt. Carmel Public Road with the South
right-of-way line of the Sinclair Public Road);
thence run in a Southerly direction along the East
right-of-way line of the Columbia to Mt. Carmel
Public Road 420 feet; thence run East 210 feet;
thence run Northerly parallel with the East margin
of the Columbia to Mt. Carmel Public Road to a
point due East of the point of beginning; thence
run West 210 feet to the point of beginning; being
two (2) acres, more or less, situated in the SE's
of NE% of Section 4, Township 5 North, Range 18
West.

PARCEL 3: 13.98 acres in the NE of NE% of Sec-
tion 4, Township 5 North, Range 18 West, described
by beginning at the Northwest corner of NE of NEX
of said Section 4, and thence run East 8 chains
and 50 links to the Columbia & Mt. Carmel Public
Road; thence run South 15 degrees West along the
meanderings of the West margin of said road 5
chains and 22 links; thence run South along the
meanderings of said West margin of said road 15
chains and 14 links; thence run West 6 chains and
68 links; thence run North 20 chains to said place
of beginning.
